'''竏嗄-sh-zh''' ('''kamashazh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:libellize|libellize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-sh-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:libellize|libellize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗄-sh-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kamashazh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimashazh|thimashazh]] || [[word:jimashazh|jimashazh]] || [[word:shimashazh|shimashazh]] || [[word:kimashazh|kimashazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumashazh|thuthumashazh]] || [[word:jujumashazh|jujumashazh]] || [[word:shushumashazh|shushumashazh]] || [[word:kukumashazh|kukumashazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thumashazh|thumashazh]] || [[word:jumashazh|jumashazh]] || [[word:shumashazh|shumashazh]] || [[word:kumashazh|kumashazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thumashazh|thumashazh]] || [[word:jumashazh|jumashazh]] || [[word:shumashazh|shumashazh]] || [[word:kumashazh|kumashazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:themashazh|themashazh]] || [[word:jemashazh|jemashazh]] || [[word:shemashazh|shemashazh]] || [[word:kemashazh|kemashazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothomashazh|thothomashazh]] || [[word:jojomashazh|jojomashazh]] || [[word:shoshomashazh|shoshomashazh]] || [[word:kokomashazh|kokomashazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomashazh|thomashazh]] || [[word:jomashazh|jomashazh]] || [[word:shomashazh|shomashazh]] || [[word:komashazh|komashazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomashazh|thomashazh]] || [[word:jomashazh|jomashazh]] || [[word:shomashazh|shomashazh]] || [[word:komashazh|komashazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦmashazh|thﾃｦmashazh]] || [[word:jﾃｦmashazh|jﾃｦmashazh]] || [[word:shﾃｦmashazh|shﾃｦmashazh]] || [[word:kﾃｦmashazh|kﾃｦmashazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathamashazh|thathamashazh]] || [[word:jajamashazh|jajamashazh]] || [[word:shashamashazh|shashamashazh]] || [[word:kakamashazh|kakamashazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thamashazh|thamashazh]] || [[word:jamashazh|jamashazh]] || [[word:shamashazh|shamashazh]] || [[word:kamashazh|kamashazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thamashazh|thamashazh]] || [[word:jamashazh|jamashazh]] || [[word:shamashazh|shamashazh]] || [[word:kamashazh|kamashazh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shamashazh|shamashazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshamashazh|goshamashazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishamashazh|gokishamashazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shamashazhnﾃｼ|shamashazhnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshamashazhnknﾃｼ|goshamashazhnknﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishamashazhnﾃｼ|gokishamashazhnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shamashazhshﾃｫ|shamashazhshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshamashazhnkshﾃｫ|goshamashazhnkshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishamashazhshﾃｫ|gokishamashazhshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamashazhro|shamashazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamashazhnkro|goshamashazhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamashazhro|gokishamashazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shamashazhmu|shamashazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamashazhnkmu|goshamashazhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamashazhmu|gokishamashazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shamashazhsher|shamashazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshamashazhnksher|goshamashazhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishamashazhsher|gokishamashazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shamashazhng|shamashazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshamashazhnkng|goshamashazhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishamashazhng|gokishamashazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shamashazhya|shamashazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshamashazhnkya|goshamashazhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishamashazhya|gokishamashazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shamashazhyam|shamashazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshamashazhnkyam|goshamashazhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishamashazhyam|gokishamashazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamashazhnﾃｼshﾃｫ|shamashazhnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamashazhnknﾃｼshﾃｫ|goshamashazhnknﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamashazhnﾃｼshﾃｫ|gokishamashazhnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamashazhnﾃｼro|shamashazhnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamashazhnknﾃｼro|goshamashazhnknﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamashazhnﾃｼro|gokishamashazhnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamashazhnﾃｼmu|shamashazhnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamashazhnknﾃｼmu|goshamashazhnknﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamashazhnﾃｼmu|gokishamashazhnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamashazhshﾃｫnﾃｼ|shamashazhshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamashazhnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ|goshamashazhnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamashazhshﾃｫnﾃｼ|gokishamashazhshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamashazhshﾃｫro|shamashazhshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamashazhnkshﾃｫro|goshamashazhnkshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamashazhshﾃｫro|gokishamashazhshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamashazhshﾃｫmu|shamashazhshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamashazhnkshﾃｫmu|goshamashazhnkshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamashazhshﾃｫmu|gokishamashazhshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamashazhronﾃｼ|shamashazhronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamashazhnkronﾃｼ|goshamashazhnkronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamashazhronﾃｼ|gokishamashazhronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamashazhroshﾃｫ|shamashazhroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamashazhnkroshﾃｫ|goshamashazhnkroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamashazhroshﾃｫ|gokishamashazhroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamashazhromu|shamashazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamashazhnkromu|goshamashazhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamashazhromu|gokishamashazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamashazhmunﾃｼ|shamashazhmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamashazhnkmunﾃｼ|goshamashazhnkmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamashazhmunﾃｼ|gokishamashazhmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamashazhmushﾃｫ|shamashazhmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamashazhnkmushﾃｫ|goshamashazhnkmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamashazhmushﾃｫ|gokishamashazhmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamashazhmuro|shamashazhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamashazhnkmuro|goshamashazhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamashazhmuro|gokishamashazhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki active verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
